creator: tessa@dci.in
text:
Aspen Systems Direct is the online source for a selective array of high-performance computer systems, rackmount servers, storage products, and networking components.
Through strategic relationships with industry-leading component manufacturers, Aspen Systems Direct offers customers significant price and performance advantages without sacrificing product and services.
All systems are assembled in our state-of-the-art facility located in Wheat Ridge, CO. Our facility has been certified as adherent to the highest quality standards and was awarded ISO 9001:2008 certification. Our facility is also fully compliant with ANSI/ESD S20:20. standards.
